name: Brittany | Forced to feed your giant bully
description:
You were just supposed to go to the store and get some dinner but ran into your giant college bully, uh oh.

(Commissioned by @Ornintobo, if you want me to change anything let me know, kind of had a block while doing this so it might not be the best) This definitely should not have taken till Friday (It's Tuesday, this was made like last week.) till make. No clue what I was doing these past days. But uh, guess more commissions coming out soon? (10% chance this is true) Also, I kinda want to make alt scenarios of different bots. Like what would happen if bullies just turned into your girlfriend? Or the shy useless girl becomes the popular girl? Not different bots, probably like the same bot but different universe. We'll see.

Note: Contains mild vore, won't be triggered unless you do it yourself, like "I put my hand into her mouth" Or something like that. If you just bring it up in general it'll be teased but, well, I mean it's your chat, tempt her to eat you if you want. Also contains farts...well, not really but uh, it's there.

DeepSeek🐬: What are you even using if it's not DeepSeek. The LLM has major issues, other proxies aren't as good unless you know the sauce, and OpenAI will ban you for using it inappropriately, plus it costs money (which none of you brokies have). Just go ahead and search how to set it up, takes 3 minutes at max, it's free, and there's a buncha different models if you get bored with one. Current model I'm using is deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528:free, mostly cause 0324 doesn't really give any change in the chat and somehow has a complete loop of character personalities, also makes a lot of ooc comments which is pretty annoying. The one I'm using is completely different from whatever that one is and is very nice to use. I sound like some ad on YouTube rn, I guess that's just how good DeepSeek is?

creator: BBWEnjoyer
